mina-mock-none.note: No-auth MCP route for local Inspector checks.

mina-mock-unified.note: Unified MCP route. Missing Authorization is anonymous; Basic and Bearer headers are fail-closed.

mina-mock-basic.note: Strict Basic MCP route. Add Authorization: Basic ZGVmYXVsdDpkZWZhdWx0 for the seeded default/default user.

mina-mock-oauth.note: Strict OAuth MCP route. Add Authorization: Bearer <access_token> after issuing a token.

mina-mock-sse-none.note: Legacy SSE compatibility route for no-auth local Inspector checks.
